id.description: VTEX transaction ID. The ID of the transaction related with this payment.

reference.description: VTEX order reference key. The key of the order (from VTEX Orders system) related with this payment.

store.description: Store name. This is the same name used to access the store Admin via URL.

deviceFingerprint.description: Device fingerprint generated by the provider. This is generated by using Google Tag Manager that the provider implements. This field is optional, is sent only if received.

hook.description: URL to be called when the payment status changes. For more information, see [Authorization and Callback URL](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/payments-integration-purchase-flows#authorization).

transactionStartDate.description: Date and time when the transaction started, in ISO 8601 format.

merchantSettings.description: Custom fields (for the given Provider) which the Merchant must fill. Each element of this array is a key-value pair.
